reasoning: The Coalition of the Willing is intended as a post-war reassurance and security force to guarantee a ceasefire or peace deal for Ukraine. As of mid to late December 2025, there has been no ceasefire or peace agreement ending the conflict, and European leaders have consistently stated that these troops would be deployed 'after hostilities have ceased.' UK Prime Minister Starmer recently noted that military plans for the force are prepared, but deployment remains an 'option' pending the right conditions. With just 10 days remaining in 2025, deploying a multinational military force before the end of the year without a precipitating peace agreement is highly improbable and inconsistent with all stated policies. I assess the probability at the absolute minimum floor of 0.02.
